assumption: Times assume you arrive on schedule — no wait for your departure, and timed connections. The catch is frequency: if you're not timed to the train, add up to one headway of waiting.
access: ≈14 min walk (or ~4 min by bike) from the house to Bernried station — that's baked into every time below.

lines.detail: Direct Bernried ↔ Tutzing ↔ München Hbf (~36 min) and ↔ Kochel. Densified to ½-hourly Tutzing–Penzberg at peak.
Every 20 min Starnberg–Munich; from Tutzing the gap alternates 20/40 min. Reaches the lake S-Bahn stops and central Munich.
